Who We Are

Built For Precision Engineering

Founded in 2016, NYN Industries has grown into a trusted automation partner for manufacturers across India. Headquartered at MIDC Waluj, Chhatrapati Sambhajinagar (Aurangabad) with an additional facility in Pune.

Est. 2016  ·  Aurangabad & Pune
  • Continuous Improvement in every solution we deliver
  • Precision & Reliability at the core of every design
  • Innovation & Engineering Excellence across all domains
  • Customer Commitment & Long-term Partnership
  • Integrity, Transparency, Safety & Ethics
🎯

Our Vision

To be the world's most innovative designer of robust SPM and smart automation solutions that revolutionises global manufacturing — setting new global benchmarks in precision engineering to transform production lines into highly efficient, sustainable, and intelligent environments.

⚙️

Our Mission

To empower industries with tailored, high-performance automation technology and durable, innovative SPM solutions driven by continuous innovation and precision engineering — optimising operations, maximising quality, boosting productivity, and minimising human error.

🏆

Our Core Values

The principles that guide every project we take on:

Continuous Improvement
Precision & Reliability
Engineering Excellence
Customer Partnership
Integrity & Transparency
Safety & Ethics
What We Do

Our Services

From concept to commissioning — every solution is engineered from the ground up to meet your specific production requirements and floor constraints.

01
🤖

Robotic Solutions

Robot machine tending, welding automation, pick & place, and full robotic cell integration for high-volume production lines.

02
⚙️

Special Purpose Machines

Custom SPMs including drilling & tapping machines, laser marking systems, and multi-station machining solutions.

03
⚡

Industrial Automation

Turnkey automation with PLC control panels, HMI integration, and complete process automation for any industry.

04
🔥

Welding Automation

Robotic and semi-automatic welding systems designed for consistency, speed, and repeatable weld quality.

05
📐

Design Consultancy

2D to 3D data conversion, reverse engineering, prototyping, and new product development services.

06
🛠️

Machine Reconditioning

Refurbishment and performance restoration of existing machinery — extending life and reducing replacement costs.

07
🏗️

Conveyors & Fixtures

Custom conveyor systems, hydraulic & pneumatic fixtures, and assembly line pallets for your exact workflow.

08
💡

Low Cost Automation

Affordable, high-ROI automation solutions that make productivity gains accessible at every scale of industry.

09
🔬

New Product Development

End-to-end NPD from concept through prototyping to production-ready mechanical and automation systems.

Our Work

Product Showcase

Real delivered systems — directly from our workshop floor to your screen. Every image below is an actual NYN Industries project.

Drilling & Tapping SPM — 3 Wheeler Crankshaft

3D Design Model

CAD model of the custom Drilling & Tapping SPM — designed specifically for 3-Wheeler Crankshaft machining operations.

Commissioned Machine

The actual machine after build and commissioning — multi-spindle drilling & tapping in a single precise cycle.

Laser Marking Machine

Laser Marking Machine

High-precision laser marking system for part traceability, VIN marking, and batch coding — custom-built for production line integration.

Production Line Installation

Multiple laser marking stations deployed on an active production floor — delivering consistent, high-throughput marking.

Robot Machine Tending & Welding Automation

Robot Machine Tending

Industrial robot performing automated CNC machine loading/unloading — eliminating manual handling and reducing cycle time significantly.

Robot Welding Automation

Robotic welding cell delivering consistent, high-quality welds at scale — engineered for precision and repeatability on complex assemblies.

Conveyors

Roller Conveyor

Gravity and powered roller conveyor for flexible material flow — modular design allows easy reconfiguration.

Slat Conveyor

Heavy-duty slat conveyor for inter-station transfer — designed for precise part positioning in automotive assembly lines.

Belt Conveyor

Flat green-belt conveyor for controlled, smooth part transfer between machining and assembly stations.

Fixtures

Marking Fixture — Cylinder Block

Precision-machined fixture for consistent cylinder block location during laser or stamp marking operations on the production line.

Pallet for Assembly Line

Custom-engineered assembly line pallet with precision locators — built to exact dimensional tolerances for automotive assembly operations.

Electrical Control Panels

PLC Control Panel

Custom industrial electrical control panel with Siemens / Allen Bradley PLC — engineered for reliable machine and automation control.

Power Distribution Panel

Industrial-grade power distribution and safety relay panel — built to IS/IEC standards with full wiring documentation.

The NYN Advantage

Why Choose Us

01

Proven Expertise

Over 50+ successful projects delivered across automotive, heavy machinery, and industrial sectors since 2016 — each on time, every time.

02

Custom Engineering

Every solution is designed from the ground up to meet your specific client metrics, production targets, and floor constraints. No off-the-shelf compromises.

03

Integrated Support

Comprehensive after-sales service, operator training, and remote diagnostics ensure maximum uptime long after installation and commissioning.

04

Dual Locations

Headquartered in Aurangabad with an additional facility in Pune — ensuring responsive local support for manufacturers across Maharashtra.

50+

Successful Projects Delivered

From single-cell robotic installations to complete turnkey automation lines — NYN has engineered and commissioned solutions that our customers rely on every single day. We don't just deliver machines — we deliver outcomes.

Our Commitments

Engineered With Responsibility

NYN Industries is dedicated to sustainable and ethical engineering practices. We adhere to international safety standards, prioritise energy-efficient designs, and invest continuously in workforce development.

Every system we deliver is built not just to perform today, but to operate reliably for years — with minimal environmental footprint and maximum safety for every operator on the floor.

International Safety Standards

All machines designed and built to meet relevant IS/IEC safety norms and machine guarding requirements.

Energy-Efficient Design

Systems optimised for minimum power consumption — reducing both operating costs and carbon footprint.

Workforce Development

Continuous investment in our team's skills ensures cutting-edge techniques in every project we deliver.

Comprehensive After-Sales

Full after-sales support, operator training, spare parts availability, and remote diagnostics for maximum uptime.
